{{Quote|So many pilots believe they are the only thing keeping the Empire together. They do not realize that they are but a single thread in the grand tapestry. They do not realize that they could be cut and the whole would remain.|Fa'Zoll|<ref name="SWG:JtL">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]''</ref>}}
'''Fa'Zoll''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] and a member of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitorius]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Nobody expects the Imperial Inquisition!|Fa'Zoll|<ref name="SWG:JtL" />}}
Inquisitor Fa'Zoll is an Imperial Pilot Trainer in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
